member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder
member.summary: Dreamine WPF 애플리케이션 초기화를 담당합니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder.Initialize(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Dreamine MVVM WPF 런타임을 기본 옵션으로 초기화합니다.
member.param: View, ViewModel, Model, Event, Manager 등의 자동 등록 및 매핑 대상으로 사용할 루트 어셈블리입니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder.Initialize(System.Reflection.Assembly,Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions)
member.summary: Dreamine MVVM WPF 런타임을 지정한 옵션으로 초기화합니다.
member.param: View, ViewModel, Model, Event, Manager 등의 자동 등록 및 매핑 대상으로 사용할 루트 어셈블리입니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder.RegisterDefaultViewModelResolver
member.summary: Registers the default ViewModel resolver used by ViewModelLocator.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder.RegisterDefaultServices(Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions)
member.summary: Dreamine WPF 기본 서비스를 등록합니다. 이미 등록된 서비스는 덮어쓰지 않습니다.

remarks.para:
Hybrid(Blazor+WPF) 시나리오에서 IServiceCollection.AddDreamineHybridWpf()를 사용하면 Blazor의 IServiceProvider와 Dreamine의 DMContainer가 동시에 활성화됩니다. 이중 등록으로 인한 혼란을 방지하려면:
App.xaml.cs 의 Composition Root에서 DreamineAppBuilder.Initialize()를 먼저 호출하여 DMContainer를 구성한 후, IServiceCollection에 services.AddSingleton<IViewManager>(sp => DMContainer.Resolve<IViewManager>()) 형태로 브리지 등록하십시오.
단일 서비스를 두 컨테이너 모두에 직접 등록하지 마십시오. 어느 한쪽에만 등록하고 다른 쪽은 팩토리 위임으로 연결하는 것이 안전합니다.
장기적으로는 DMContainer.SetContainer(new MsExtensionsAdapter(serviceProvider)) 패턴으로 DMContainer가 MS.Extensions.DI를 백엔드로 사용하도록 통합할 수 있습니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder.RegisterGlobalAutoWireHandlerOnce
member.summary: WPF FrameworkElement Loaded 이벤트의 전역 ViewModel 자동 주입 핸들러를 한 번만 등록합니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder.RegisterAutoNavigatorHandlerOnce(System.String)
member.summary: Window Loaded 시점에 지정된 RegionName을 찾아 INavigator를 자동 등록하는 핸들러를 한 번만 등록합니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder.RegisterNavigatorFromWindow(System.Windows.Window,System.String)
member.summary: 지정한 Window 내부에서 RegionName이 일치하는 ContentControl을 찾아 INavigator를 등록합니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineAppBuilder.AttachViewModelIfExists(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: WPF FrameworkElement의 Loaded 이벤트에서 호출되는 핸들러입니다. View의 DataContext가 비어 있을 경우, ViewModelLocator를 통해 ViewModel을 자동 연결합니다.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions
member.summary: Provides configuration options for the Dreamine WPF runtime bootstrap process.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions.EnableGlobalAutoWireOnLoaded
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether every FrameworkElement Loaded event should try ViewModel auto-wiring.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions.RegisterDefaultServices
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Dreamine default WPF services should be registered automatically.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions.EnableAutoNavigatorRegistration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Dreamine should automatically register an INavigator from the default region.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions.DefaultRegionName
member.summary: Gets or sets the default region name used for automatic navigator registration.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions.FallbackWindowWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the fallback window width used when displaying a UserControl or Page without a region navigator. Defaults to 800.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions.FallbackWindowHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the fallback window height used when displaying a UserControl or Page without a region navigator. Defaults to 600.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.DreamineWpfOptions.CreateDefault
member.summary: Gets the default Dreamine WPF options.
member.returns: A new options instance with safe defaults.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.ViewManager
member.summary: Resolves and displays WPF Views based on ViewModel types. Custom view types are supported by registering implementations via .

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.ViewManager.#ctor(Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceResolver,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with an explicit resolver and optional fallback window dimensions for UserControl/Page views. Prefer this constructor in tests and production code to avoid the global DMContainer dependency.
member.param: The service resolver used to obtain ViewModel instances.
Width of the fallback window. Defaults to 800.
Height of the fallback window. Defaults to 600.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.ViewManager.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of backed by the global DMContainer.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.ViewManager.RegisterDisplayStrategy(Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IViewDisplayStrategy)
member.summary: Registers a custom display strategy that handles view types not natively supported (Window, UserControl, Page). Strategies are evaluated in registration order before the built-in switch, so registered strategies take precedence.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.WindowStateService
member.summary: Tracks WPF window open states in memory.
member.remarks: This implementation is designed for single-threaded use on the WPF UI thread. protects individual dictionary operations, but the write-then-event pattern in SetState is not atomic. Do not call or from background threads.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Wpf.WpfDialogService
member.summary: Default WPF implementation of backed by .
